title: cyperus conglomeratus subsp. jeminicus
intro: Cyperus conglomeratus subsp. jeminicus, also known as the East Indian flatsedge, is a type of plant in the sedge family that is native to tropical Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyperus conglomeratus subsp. jeminicus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
